result.summary: Several parts of the page appear clipped or obscured, especially on the right edge and near the bottom, which makes some navigation items and game tiles look broken.

issues.description: The rightmost category tab is cut off, with the label only showing as "Hot Gam" instead of the full title.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the tab row to fit within the viewport or enable proper horizontal scrolling/padding so the full label is visible.

issues.description: Multiple game cards in the right column are partially off-screen, with their content visibly clipped at the edge.
issues.suggestion: Fix the grid/container width or card sizing so all tiles render fully within the screen bounds.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation bar overlaps the lower game row, hiding part of the content underneath it.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding/margin to the content area equal to the footer height, or make the footer non-overlapping.
